title: Streamer Tool
description: The ultimate lightweight toolkit for SMP creators. Features persistent vanish, nametag hiding, and fully configurable fake join/leave messages.
body:
# 🎬 StreamerTools
**The ultimate lightweight toolkit designed specifically for Content Creators, Streamers, and Lore SMPs.**

Are you tired of ruining cinematic shots because your nametag is visible? Do you need to log in to your server to spectate without chat knowing you are online? **StreamerTools** is a completely customizable, lightweight utility plugin that gives server owners and creators complete control over their presence in-game. 

---

### ✨ Features
* 👻 **Persistent Vanish Mode:** Our vanish system is saved directly to the player's data. Even if the server restarts or you log off for a week, you will remain completely hidden the exact second you log back in.
* 🚪 **Fake Join/Leave Messages:** Gaslight the server into thinking you logged off! Vanishing automatically broadcasts a configurable fake leave message to preserve the illusion.
* 🏷️ **Nametag & Tablist Hider:** Need to record a scene but remain physically visible? Use `/hidetag` to completely wipe your overhead name and remove yourself from the Tablist.
* 🎥 **"Director" Protections:** While vanished, you are immune to damage, ignored by mobs, unable to accidentally pick up items, and prevented from accidentally breaking/placing blocks on your recording set.
* 🦉 **Auto-Night Vision:** Automatically grants infinite Night Vision while vanished so you can spectate in dark caves effortlessly.
* ⚙️ **100% Configurable:** Every single text message, broadcast color, and vanish perk can be toggled or rewritten in the `config.yml`.

---

### 💻 Commands & Permissions
| Command | Description | Permission (Coming Soon) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/vanish` (or `/v`) | Toggles complete, persistent invisibility and fakes logoff. | `streamertools.vanish` |
| `/hidetag` | Toggles overhead nametag and tablist presence. | `streamertools.hidetag` |

---

### 🚀 Upcoming Features (Roadmap)
We are actively developing this plugin to be the undisputed #1 Youtuber Kit. In the next updates, expect:
* **In-Game GUI Menu:** Control all your settings from a clickable chest inventory.
* **/disguise Integration:** Hook into SkinRestorer to seamlessly swap names and skins for roleplay.
* **Director Tools:** Clickable hotbar items for instant vanish toggling.

---
*Built for modern Minecraft (1.21+). Requires Paper/Purpur.*


# ⚠ Plugin Under Development will release new version soon currently older ones available for 1.20 which doesnt have same features as specified
